title: ajuga lobata
intro: Ajuga lobata, also known as Bugleweed or Ajuga, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and insomnia, and alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism. Ajuga lobata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
